info.title: Blog
info.about: This is where I write things. Or at least it will be where I write things, as soon as I start writing things.

node.excerpt:
Hi, I'm James.
I'm currently on industrial placement in  Silicon Valley  at  Cisco Systems  in between my studies at the  University of Kent , and between my day to day work I actively contribute to my ongoing projects.
In my spare time you'll…

This very site you are reading, is open source.
You may fork it and fill in your own data if you wish, and all of the source code is on GitHub.
I created this with GatsbyJS as I knew the benefits of being able to have a site which simply consumes…
On December 1st 2018, a group of friends and I were attending the MLH Local Hack Day in San Francisco.
